name: Banana-Walnut Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Walnuts or pecans (toasted and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the ingredients to your bread machine according to the manufacturer's directions, mixing the banana with the milk first.
2. Use the light setting if available.
3. The recipe has not been tried yet, so please let me know if it turns out well.
